name: Sentry
description: Inspect errors and releases. This official Sentry MCP integration is installable through Cline.

install.notes: Transport from source catalog: Remote MCP service; stdio supported via npm package. Auth from source catalog: OAuth for remote flow; Sentry user auth token for stdio/self-hosted. Screenshot-only row. Official getsentry/sentry-mcp repo; stdio requires Sentry auth token with org/project/team/event scopes; remote production service is mcp.sentry.dev.
